title: Schoenoplectus oryzetorum
taxonomy: Schoenoplectus oryzetorum is classified within the family Cyperaceae, commonly known as the sedge family. This classification is based on its characteristics and morphology, which are similar to other members of the Cyperaceae family. Schoenoplectus oryzetorum is a genus within the family, and it is further divided into several species. The species within the genus Schoenoplectus are typically found in wetland environments and have adapted to life in water or saturated soils. This classification provides a framework for understanding the evolutionary relationships among species within the Cyperaceae family.
